text-block-1.title: Navigating the Resource Tree
text-block-1.text:
The Sling Resource API provides a unified way to access content regardless of where it's stored. Whether data lives in JCR, a file system, or a remote service, the Resource API abstracts it all behind a consistent interface.

It's like being able to see the Matrix code directly - every resource exposed through a common API for traversal and manipulation.

code-block-1.title: Using the Resource API

text-block-2.title: Key Resource Methods
text-block-2.text:
• getPath() - Returns the absolute path to the resource
  • getResourceType() - Returns the sling:resourceType
  • adaptTo(Class) - Adapts resource to another type
  • getValueMap() - Accesses resource properties
  • getChildren() - Iterates child resources
  • getParent() - Navigates to parent resource
